title: New feature in the Apps marketplace!
excerpt:

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you heard about our new App Rating and Review feature in the Apps Marketplace?

In case you missed it, we recently released an app rating and review feature to give users a better understanding of the application’s performance and quality​:sparkles: while also providing external app developers in the marketplace with instant feedback to make the necessary adjustments to improve the app and overall user experience.

All things boards 👀 (4)3250×2600 235 KB

To note, app developers will be able to access analytics about the app via the developer center (including, textual reviews, and total ratings) and our monday users will be able to rate apps that are installed in their account and view app ratings in the market

Are you an avid app user or developer? If so, will this new feature come in handy?! Let us know in the comments below

posts.author: Usernamegame (Jake N)
posts.cookedHtml: @BiancaT, it seems to be the case that one cannot rate apps made by Monday.com. Is this true and, if so, why?

posts.author: myrrhw (Myrrh Winston)
posts.cookedHtml: How do you see the ratings and reviews? They don’t come up when clicked. It would be very useful to see what other users actually think about the apps.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Myrrh,

For some more background:

  1. marketplace app developers can view, on their app level (on the developer center), analytics about their app (like, avg score, total ratings, review (textual) description, etc)

  2. monday users can rate apps that are installed in their account, and watch app ratings in the marketplace (however cannot access the reviews).

I hope this helps!

posts.author: myrrhw (Myrrh Winston)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Bianca! It seems strange to have reviews that potential users can’t see before deciding to install.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I hear where you’re coming from Myrrth! Happy to share this with our internal team
